Struct Color

Namespace
ClaySharp.Interop
Assembly
BlackHook.ClaySharp.dll

Represents a color using four floating-point components (Red, Green, Blue, Alpha).

public struct Color

Remarks

Component values are typically represented in the range [0.0 - 255.0] matching native Clay conventions.
